title: Pancetta and Egyptian Pepper Casserole
description: A hearty, flavorful casserole featuring the rich taste of pancetta and the spicy kick of Egyptian peppers.
instructions: Cook pancetta in olive oil until crispy, then set aside.
Saute diced Egyptian peppers until tender.
Add crushed tomatoes to the pan and cook for 5 minutes.
Combine cooked pancetta, peppers, and tomatoes in a large bowl.
Add grated Parmesan cheese and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
